description: Benchmark tests for forgejo-sync skill - User Story to Forgejo Issue sync and PRD Wiki publishing

evals.name: story-to-issue-sync
evals.prompt: 同步 User Story 到 Forgejo Issue: story_id=US-001, title=用户登录功能, description=实现JWT登录, acceptance_criteria=[登录成功返回token, 失败返回401], repo=10cg/my-project

assertions.name: creates_forgejo_issue
assertions.description: Should create or update a Forgejo Issue from the User Story

assertions.name: maps_story_title
assertions.description: Should map User Story title to Issue title

assertions.name: includes_acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Should include acceptance criteria in Issue body
assertions.check: output.includes('acceptance') || output.includes('验收') || output.includes('criteria') || output.includes('token') || output.includes('401')

evals.name: prd-to-wiki-publish
evals.prompt: 将 PRD 文档发布到 Forgejo Wiki: prd_path=openspec/changes/user-auth/proposal.md, wiki_page=User-Auth-PRD, repo=10cg/my-project, version=1.0

assertions.name: publishes_to_wiki
assertions.description: Should publish PRD content to Forgejo Wiki

assertions.name: references_prd_path
assertions.description: Should reference the source PRD document path

assertions.name: sets_wiki_page_name
assertions.description: Should use correct wiki page name

evals.name: bidirectional-status-sync
evals.prompt: 双向同步状态: story_id=US-001, forgejo_issue=42, story_status=in-progress, issue_status=open, direction=bidirectional, repo=10cg/my-project

assertions.name: syncs_status_to_issue
assertions.description: Should update Forgejo Issue status to match Story status
assertions.check: output.includes('in-progress') || output.includes('进行中') || output.includes('status') || output.includes('状态')

assertions.name: reflects_issue_back_to_story
assertions.description: Should reflect Forgejo Issue changes back to User Story
assertions.check: output.includes('bidirectional') || output.includes('双向') || output.includes('sync') || output.includes('同步')

assertions.name: identifies_both_entities
assertions.description: Should identify both the story and issue being synced

evals.name: label-mapping
evals.prompt: 映射 Story 元数据到 Forgejo Labels: story_id=US-001, priority=high, module=backend, type=feature, sprint=Sprint-3, repo=10cg/my-project

assertions.name: maps_priority_label
assertions.description: Should map priority to a Forgejo label

assertions.name: maps_module_label
assertions.description: Should map module identifier to a label

assertions.name: maps_type_label
assertions.description: Should map story type to a label
